## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are on average 4.8 seconds per flight lower in the Netherlands. The highest average time flown level during descent happens at Eelde (EHGG) (419.4 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Amsterdam (EHAM) (138 seconds per flight).
